name: Health Tracker
description: Developed a responsive dashboard to monitor blood-test results and automatically flag values outside healthy reference ranges.
Built interactive trend charts, summary cards, category filters, validated data-entry forms, and historical reading tables.
Designed the application for future PDF report importing using PDF.js and Tesseract.js OCR, enabling automatic extraction of medical test data.

name: Indexing Admin Panel
description: Developed a scalable dashboard for real-time indexing of products and content management.
Built 10+ modules for efficient configuration, crawling control, and indexing operations.
Implemented responsive and user-friendly UI using Material UI with cross-device compatibility.

name: Chatbot Flow Builder
description: Built a drag-and-drop chatbot flow builder with node-based architecture similar to MindMup.
Implemented custom validation logic for nodes and connections to ensure correct workflow creation.
Designed an interactive flow editor enabling users to visually create and manage chatbot conversations.

name: Dynamic Filter System
description: Built a reusable configuration-driven filter builder for employee data tables using React.js and TypeScript.
Implemented advanced filtering with text, number, currency, date, select, multi-select, and boolean field support.
Added real-time client-side filtering, nested field access, sortable table view, record counts, empty states, and CSV export functionality.
